title: Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!
why_this_song: Gimme! Gimme! Gimme! by ABBA (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 30 times; first heard in: "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme a man after midnight"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme a man after midnight"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "There's not a soul out there"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "There's not a soul out there"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Won't somebody help me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gimme" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gimme" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "midnight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "midnight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And I'm watching the late show
Gimme! Gimme! Gimme a man after midnight

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask ABBA one question about "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para ABBA sobre "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
